With the 2024 Olympic Games underway in Paris, we're witnessing a historic milestone in the fight for gender equality. For the first time ever, the Games will achieve gender parity, with equal numbers of male and female athletes competing. The landmark achievement is being celebrated through archives restored by Chinese tech giant Alibaba, featuring women in the Olympics who've made history. CGTN's Feng Yilei has the details.
